generated by https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-docs

page_title: "gigamon Provider" description: |-

gigamon Provider

Schema

Required

  • fm_address (String) FM address, either the IP numerical address or DNS name

Optional

  • api_token (String, Sensitive) api token generated from FM for use in token based authentication
  • password (String, Sensitive) password of the user when using basic authentication
  • user_name (String) User Name when using basic authentication
